title: Changes for Knynsa (NPO) hosts successful Christmas outreach
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Changes of Knysna (NPO) successfully hosted its annual Christmas outreach, providing much-needed support to elderly residents, children and families in need across the Knysna area.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Changes of Knysna (NPO) successfully hosted its annual Christmas outreach, providing much-needed support to elderly residents, children and families in need across the Knysna area."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The initiative served warm Christmas meals to approximately 350 people, with an additional 50 meals delivered to individuals who were unable to attend due to personal circumstances."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The project was made possible through the generous support of community members and local donors.","html":"The project was made possible through the generous support of community members and local donors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following the main event, remaining non-perishable food items were distributed within the community. Beneficiaries received meal packs that included juice, a sweet treat and fresh bread rolls sponsored by Food Lovers.","html":"Following the main event, remaining non-perishable food items were distributed within the community. Beneficiaries received meal packs that included juice, a sweet treat and fresh bread rolls sponsored by Food Lovers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Selected elderly residents also received small grocery hampers.","html":"Selected elderly residents also received small grocery hampers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisers thanked everyone who contributed to making the outreach a reality.","html":"The organisers thanked everyone who contributed to making the outreach a reality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Changes for Knynsa (NPO) hosts successful Christmas outreach
